chain.thought: Explanation: In the "open cup" column, the group qualified in 1998 and 2007 (listed as "1st round"), totaling 2 qualifications. For all other years (14 entries), it is listed as "did not qualify." Therefore, they qualified 2 times and failed to qualify 14 times.

judge_thought: Explanation: The Open Cup column shows "1st round" (qualified) in 1998 and 2007, totaling 2 qualifications. All other years (1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013) are "did not qualify," totaling 14 failures. Thus, 2|14 is correct.
